testimonials.text: I fully regained my mobility after surgery thanks to the specialized therapeutic programs. Dr. Mostafa is truly exceptional.
testimonials.author: Ahmed Mohamed

testimonials.text: I was suffering from chronic back pain and now I can return to my daily activities without any discomfort.
testimonials.author: Fatima Ali

testimonials.text: The cupping therapy combined with physical therapy gave me excellent results. A highly professional and friendly team.
testimonials.author: Mahmoud Hassan

testimonials.text: Professional service from start to finish. Dr. Mostafa explains everything clearly and pays close attention to treatment details.
testimonials.author: Noureddine
